prose:
The frontier orbital analysis of TEMPO was performed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The calculation treated the molecule as a neutral doublet (charge 0, multiplicity 2). The SCF calculation converged in 12 cycles.

The resulting HOMO and LUMO energies are -6.3375 eV and -2.4651 eV, respectively, leading to a HOMO-LUMO gap of 3.8724 eV. The calculation reported no warnings and its integrity is trustworthy.
